category_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/zimbatm/mdsh describes mdsh as a markdown shell pre-processor for automating README/tutorial outputs.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading: `$ mdsh` - a markdown shell pre-processor
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository links https://zimbatm.github.io/mdsh/ as the project website and README documents usage.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub Pages documentation URL
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/zimbatm/mdsh; per instruction, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository topics include shell, markdown, and pre-processing; README documents command execution in Markdown.
